**Subject Line:**  
⚠️ Verify Your Account Details – Urgent Action Required

---

**Body:**

Dear [Customer Name],

We have recently noticed unusual activity on your account and want to ensure your account details are up to date to protect your financial information.

To confirm your identity and secure your account, please verify your personal information by clicking the link below:

[Verify Your Account Details](https://examplebank.com/verify)

This is a secure link and will not expire for 24 hours. If you are unable to click the link, you may also visit our website directly at [examplebank.com](https://examplebank.com) and log in to your account to complete the verification process.

Please note: We will not ask for your password or any sensitive information via email. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact our Customer Support team at [support@examplebank.com](mailto:support@examplebank.com) or call us at 1-800-555-1234.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
Customer Support Team  
[Bank Name]  
[Bank Website]  
[Bank Phone Number]

---

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
Customer
